desc:
Minerva is located at The Crater in the northern Toxic Valley. Fast travel to The Crater and proceed west, away from the crop fields, to reach her position.
Minerva rotates weekly among four locations. Check the the Nuke Codes & Minerva button in the tools panel.
Grid F9 (X: 2206.8, Y: 3442.5)
Submitted By Anonymous Wastelander
